curation.synopsis: On the forge world Morod, workers spend their lives feeding machines while the Adeptus Mechanicus rule from palatial heights. Genetor Gammat Triskellian sees rot in that stagnation and discovers a hidden congregation promising salvation through angels; the cult sees the same hour as the long-awaited day of ascension. The truth is Genestealer, but the novel lets both sides argue from hunger, faith, and the need to break a world that is already devouring its people. Investigator and convert both get moral teeth before the trap closes. Reform, rebellion, and damnation blur into one uprising. A dual-POV industrial nightmare in a philosophical-cosmic-horror key.
